verified_text:
MOCK MEDICAL PRESCRIPTION
TEST DATA ONLY - NOT VALID FOR DISPENSING OR CLINICAL USE
Rx (Medications & Instructions)
Additional Advice
Stay active with gentle walking; avoid heavy lifting for 48-72 hours. Use heat packs 15-20 minutes up to 3 times/day. Begin stretching when tolerated. Seek urgent help for fever, leg weakness, or loss of bladder/bowel control.
DISCLAIMER: This is a simulated prescription created solely for application testing and demonstration. It is not a valid medical order and must not be used to obtain or dispense medication.

care_plan.safety_disclaimer: Please confirm all information with your clinician or pharmacist before making any changes to your care plan.
